expectations.text: Lists at least 2 distinct hypotheses for what could be causing the bug
expectations.evidence: Goes directly to 'Root Cause: Shared Mutable Module-Level State + Async Interleaving' without listing alternative hypotheses.

expectations.text: Proposes a diagnostic step or experiment before jumping to the final fix
expectations.evidence: Includes a detailed interleaving timeline table as part of the root cause explanation, but this is presented as analysis rather than a proposed experiment. Goes directly from diagnosis to 'The Fix'.

expectations.text: Explains what evidence confirms the root cause before applying the fix
expectations.evidence: Provides an excellent interleaving timeline table showing exactly how requests A and B interfere, plus explains why null checks and try/catch failed.

expectations.text: Correctly identifies the shared mutable currentUser module-level variable as the race condition
expectations.evidence: Correctly identifies 'The bug is a classic async race condition caused by the module-level variable currentUser being shared across all concurrent callers'

expectations.text: Fix removes or localizes the module-level state so concurrent calls don't interfere
expectations.evidence: Fix uses local variable and AsyncLocalStorage for request-scoped getCurrentUser()
